top_signals.title: Progress in US-Iran Talks Stalls After Hezbollah Rejects Truce
top_signals.summary: There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah militia rejected on Thursday a US-brokered truce in Lebanon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Blackstone-Backed Liftoff Raises $437 Million in IPO
top_signals.summary: Liftoff Mobile Inc. raised $437 million in a US initial public offering that priced above its marketed range, in the company’s second attempt at going public this year.

top_signals.title: Thailand politician Thaksin to head to Dubai after royal pardon sets him free
top_signals.summary: The former prime minister plans to travel to Dubai after receiving a royal pardon that wiped out the remainder of his prison sentence.
